ksa_text: Ability to identify, assess, and prioritize risks in AI systems and governance contexts; develop mitigation strategies calibrated to organizational risk tolerance and operational constraints.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-A-001 (AI Governance/Ability) scores 0.507 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.507) and is edge_case for the AI Research Scientist role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.507), and AI Governance handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI research scientists increasingly engage with alignment/safety topics (AI Governance adjacent). Technical AI safety, alignment research, and model cards may be in scope at principal level. Governance ownership and policy authorship remain out of scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI research scientists increasingly engage with alignment/safety topics (AI Governance adjacent). Final decision: include.
